top_risk: Agent runtime prematurely reports task success before writing artifacts, causing acceptance of empty reports during UAT. Combined with another agent-runtime high-severity bug (tool-call timeout leaving tasks in unknown state), the agent-runtime system is the most critical reliability risk.
recommended_actions: Fix T-1003 (CRITICAL): Agent runtime must not report success until all artifacts are written. Add post-task artifact verification before emitting success signal.
Fix T-1005 (HIGH): Tool-call timeouts must transition tasks to a well-defined error state instead of 'unknown', with automatic cleanup or retry logic.
Fix T-1001 (HIGH): Investigate authentication failure after password reset for Pilot Bank A admins — 42-minute admin downtime is a severe operational impact for a tenant.
